= Release Notes
Tobias Jakobsson <tobias@example.com>; Jane Doe
v1.2, 2026-05-04: Initial release

This document uses the positional second-line author entry and third-line
revision entry instead of `:attr:` lines. The metadata card surfaces both
authors (with the email visible for the first) and the revision number,
date, and remark.

== Highlights

* New endpoint `/things`
* Improved error reporting
